message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.4 tick 426 — JoinSet::join_next_with_cx cancel contract

Attaches tick-426 progress comment describing the new
join_set_join_next_with_cx_observes_pre_cancel test (commit 883383f9).
Extends the primitive × cancel-source matrix to cover runtime_compat-
owned primitives alongside the asupersync-delegated ones. Local count
97/97 across 6 runs.
